key_components: Mock event service with event tracking
Mock data factories for Menu, Category, Product entities
Product management with variants and modifiers

test_coverage.menu_operations: complete menu flow from creation to publication
test_coverage.product_operations: product creation with variants, modifiers, allergens
test_coverage.error_scenarios: validation errors, not found errors, constraint violations

patterns_discovered.description: Systematic use of factory functions to create mock repositories and services with all required methods
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures consistency and completeness of mock objects across all tests

patterns_discovered.description: Custom mock event service that tracks emitted events in array for verification
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables testing of event emission behavior without side effects

patterns_discovered.description: Tests follow complete lifecycle: create menu → add category → add product → publish
patterns_discovered.benefit: Validates integration between multiple services and repositories

patterns_discovered.description: Factory functions accept partial overrides to customize test data while maintaining defaults
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible test data creation without duplicating entire object structures

patterns_discovered.description: Each major operation is followed by verification of result and event emission
patterns_discovered.benefit: Catches integration issues between services at each step

patterns_discovered.description: Mock repositories include all public methods from actual implementations
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents false positives from missing mock method implementations

gotchas_discovered.description: Mock repositories are recreated in beforeEach to prevent test pollution
gotchas_discovered.impact: Critical for reliable test execution; tests don't interfere with each other

gotchas_discovered.description: Event service maintains internal array of emitted events that must be cleared between tests
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents cross-test event detection if service state isn't reset properly

gotchas_discovered.description: Mocks use 'unknown as' casting to satisfy TypeScript without full type safety
gotchas_discovered.impact: Type checking is bypassed; actual type mismatches won't be caught at compile time

gotchas_discovered.description: Product relations include variants, modifiers, allergens with nested date objects
gotchas_discovered.impact: Mock setup becomes verbose; easy to miss required nested properties

gotchas_discovered.description: Default isDefault flag for menus and variant/modifier defaults need careful ordering
gotchas_discovered.impact: Tests may pass but miss subtle ordering or precedence issues in production

approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Comprehensive integration test suite using vitest with mocked dependencies
key_achievements: Created 1171-line integration test file with complete coverage of menu flow
Implemented factory functions for all mock repositories and services
Built event tracking system into mock event service for verification
Designed data builders with override capability for flexible test scenarios
Structured tests to follow complete lifecycle: create → configure → publish
Included error handling and edge case testing
Verified event emission at each step of the flow
approach_outcome.test_organization: Hierarchical describe blocks organizing tests by feature (menu CRUD, category management, product management, publishing, error scenarios)
approach_outcome.mock_strategy: Complete repository mocking with vi.fn() for all methods, enabling isolated testing without database
approach_outcome.verification_approach: Multi-level: service response verification, event emission verification, state consistency checks

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting common test setup logic into helper functions to reduce test file size and improve maintainability
recommendations.rationale: File is 1171 lines; some setup patterns repeat across test groups

recommendations.recommendation: Replace 'unknown as' type casting with proper generic types for mock repositories to catch type mismatches at compile time
recommendations.rationale: Current approach bypasses TypeScript's type checking for mocks

recommendations.recommendation: Create a test data factory class to centralize and manage creation of test objects with consistent defaults
recommendations.rationale: Would reduce duplication and make test data modifications easier across the suite

recommendations.recommendation: Create helper assertion functions for common event verification patterns (e.g., assertEventEmitted)
recommendations.rationale: Would make event assertions more concise and readable

recommendations.recommendation: Verify that all mock repository methods match actual repository interfaces in production code
recommendations.rationale: Any missing methods in mocks would cause runtime errors if tests progress to those methods

recommendations.recommendation: Add inline comments explaining the setup phase and expected flow for complex multi-step tests
recommendations.rationale: Tests are well-structured but complex flows could benefit from additional context
